Tanzania • Safari lodge dining

Serengeti Serena Safari Lodge Dining

In the Serengeti, dining realism is about reliable camp meals and packed lunches because wildlife movement and distances dominate the day.

★ 4.4 244 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Serengeti Serena Dining

About this restaurant

In the Serengeti, dining realism is about reliable camp meals and packed lunches because wildlife movement and distances dominate the day.

Signature dish

Lodge meals and packed safari lunches

Practical information

Ask your operator which meals are packed, which are at lodge, and whether bush dining has extra cost.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Serengeti National Park.
